title: Ursus
writer: Giuseppe Mangione, Giuliano Carnimeo, Sergio Sollima
actors: Ed Fury, Cristina Gaioni, Moira Orfei
plot: Ursus returns from war to find his fiancée, Attea, has been kidnapped by a mysterious sect which sacrifices virgins to its patron goddess. Ursus faces much treachery and is forced to display much courage and strength as he and the...
